_README: Copy to config.json (gitignored) and edit. All keys are optional.
HUB (the always-on Pi): set 'source', keep the 'router' block here so router /
Traffic-Analyzer data is collected 24/7. Optionally set 'ingest_token' to require
SPOKE (the Mac): set 'source', DROP the 'router' block (the hub owns it), and add
a 'hub' block pointing at the Pi so this box pushes its samples there.
ARANET is BLE — keep it on whichever box is near the sensor.
